{{Infobox construct
| name = Imperial Aegis
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Imperial]] Aegis is a specialized defensive tool used by Sophara during combat. Functioning as a shield, the object was utilized in a tournament setting with its capabilities reduced because its properties were too similar to heavy armor. In battle, the Aegis serves as a mobile platform that can intercept incoming attacks, such as [[dragon]] breath or poison, and can be positioned to assist allies in movement. Despite its defensive utility, the shield can be forcefully displaced or knocked aside by powerful techniques.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Originating from Sophara's [[soulspace]], the [[Imperial]] Aegis is a golden disc that serves as a defensive [[construct]]. This object functions by intercepting and blocking incoming attacks to provide protection. During her encounters, Sophara utilizes the Aegis for defense, such as when it successfully blocked an arrow fired by [[Mercy]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Imperial Aegis]] is a golden disc that originates from Sophara's [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Imperial Aegis]] is an object that can block attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara uses the [[Imperial Aegis]] for defense.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Imperial Aegis]] is a defensive [[construct]] that can intercept attacks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's [[Imperial Aegis]] blocked an arrow from [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
